acerca_de_mi.p1: I am a Full Stack Developer from Argentina focused on creating and maintaining functional and scalable web applications. I currently work at the Municipality of Córdoba, participating in the development of internal systems and integrating both frontend and backend solutions. I have practical experience working with different technologies and collaborating in multidisciplinary teams to optimize processes and improve user experience.
acerca_de_mi.p2: My profile is complemented by strong organizational skills, problem-solving abilities, and adaptability to new challenges, strengthened by both my technical background and my previous experience in the administrative area. Additionally, I enjoy learning new technologies and applying development best practices to build clear, stable, and well-structured solutions.
acerca_de_mi.p3: I graduated as a Web Development and Digital Applications Technician and I continue training constantly to keep growing professionally and expand my knowledge in software development.

stack.subtitulo:
Here I present the technologies I use in my projects: frontend, backend, databases, development tools, and testing.
It's the stack I work with every day and in which I continue to grow as a professional.

proyectos.subtitulo: A selection of some of my practice and personal projects, developed with various technologies and approaches.

ecommerce.desc: E-commerce platform based on microservices with Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, and MySQL. Offers independent services (users, products, cart, and sales) integrated with a Vue 3, Pinia, and TypeScript frontend. Includes JWT authentication, roles, and persistent shopping cart.

veterinaria.desc: Web system for veterinary clinic management featuring a decoupled architecture with Vue 3 (frontend) and Spring Boot (backend). Allows managing owners, pets, appointments, and medical history, with secure authentication and role control.

blog.desc: Platform where users can create, edit, delete, and comment on posts. Includes authentication, privacy control, user permissions, dynamic post loading, and a clean, fully responsive interface.

biblioteca.desc: CRUD web application for book management with Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, and MySQL. Implements pagination, search engine, validations, responsive views, and full administration operations.

login.desc: Desktop application created with Java and Swing, using layered architecture. Includes user validation, dynamic roles, and specific views. Allows user CRUD with automatic refresh.

peluqueria.desc: Desktop app with Java and Swing for pet and owner management. 1:1 relationship, layered model, editable table, and full persistence.

concesionaria.desc: Java and Swing system that allows creating, editing, reading, and deleting vehicles using GUI – Logic – Persistence architecture.

integrador.desc: Responsive website built in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript based on a Codo a Codo design. Fully adaptable and aesthetically modern.

devdaily.desc: Multiplatform mobile application for developers offering daily technical content (tips, interview questions, and shortcuts). Features a Spring Boot backend with JWT authentication, personalized recommendations, and bookmarked favorites.

contacto.subtitulo: Want to know more about me or have any questions?
contacto.texto: Fill out the form and send me your message. I will get back to you shortly. Thanks for your interest!

swal.exito_texto:
Thank you for contacting me.
I will reply to you shortly. 🌸
swal.error_texto: There was an error sending the message. Please try again.
